CustomField.formula: IF( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Surgeries", NOT(ISBLANK(ReceiptNum__c)), ISPICKVAL(Status_private_room__c, "Canceled") ), IF( (Appointment_Date_Time__c - Cancellation_Date_Time_Private_Rooms__c) * 24 >= 24, "🟢 זיכוי מלא", IF( (Appointment_Date_Time__c - Cancellation_Date_Time_Private_Rooms__c) * 24 >= 12, "🟡 זיכוי 50%", IF( (Appointment_Date_Time__c - Cancellation_Date_Time_Private_Rooms__c) * 24 >= 4, "🔴 לא זכאי", "🔴 לא זכאי" ) ) ), "" )
CustomField.label: Refund Eligibility - Private Rooms
